set.body:
## Phase 2 — Correctness fixes (against Phase 1 tests)

- C1. Unify beta==0 semantics (assign, never read) in dgemv, dgemvRowMajor, dgemm —
  DoubleKernels.scala:153,185,271.
- C2. Honor destination offset/stride in sparse kernels — Sparse.scala:288,296-298,307,
  573-575,617-620,652-655,703-706 — and in solvers/preconditioners —
  Solvers.scala:42,53,89,99,180,201,302-324.
- C3. COO.t must not propagate hasCanonicalFormat — Sparse.scala:66-67.
- C4. Rank tolerance: drop max(1.0, maxDiag) floor; use max(m,n)*eps*maxDiag —
  Factorizations.scala:474. Hoist rankToleranceFromMatrix out of the back-substitution
  loop — Factorizations.scala:407.
- C5. Overflow-check rows.toLong*cols.toLong — Matrix.scala:276-308, Shape.scala:101.
- C6. MatrixMarket full header validation — MatrixMarket.scala:27-28.
- C7. Initial guess: Option[DVec], DimensionMismatch on wrong length —
  Solvers.scala:117-118,159-160,220-221.
- C8. GMRES: terminate inner loop on happy breakdown; stop swallowing LS failures —
  Solvers.scala:246-248,276-277.
- C9. SGS zero-diagonal guard + construction-time squareness — Solvers.scala:77-99;
  bicgstab/gmres validate b.length like cg does.
- C10. DuplicatePolicy.Error and Sparse.permutation throw LinAlgError, not
  IllegalArgumentException — Sparse.scala:199,764.
set.title: Remediation P2: correctness fixes — the ten confirmed bugs
